summary: NEXUS AI v4.2 Testing Complete - All 14 backend tests passed, frontend UI verified. Fixed MongoDB ObjectId serialization issues in agent reports.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed MongoDB ObjectId serialization in agent run endpoints - was returning _id field causing JSON serialization errors
Fixed nested ObjectId in agent_reports.report.base_agent_result._id - cleaned up existing data
Added exports for API, useAuth, api, BACKEND_URL, BoostModal, PurchaseModal in App.js - were missing causing frontend compilation errors
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py - Fixed 5 agent run functions to exclude _id from return
/app/frontend/src/App.js - Added exports for API, useAuth, api, BACKEND_URL, BoostModal, PurchaseModal
context_for_next_testing_agent: v4.2 features fully tested: Integration Status API returns all 8 integrations with health score, Softr Database integration present in status, CI/CD endpoints working, AI agent error handling returns structured responses, Homepage shows 11 agents with correct type badges (5 Core, 5 Manus, 1 Autonomous). Admin Dashboard Automation Panel has 4 sub-tabs: AIxploria, GitHub, Manus AI, Integrations. All integrations display with correct status indicators (Active, Demo, Limited, Missing).

v42_features_verified.integration_status_api: GET /api/integrations/status returns all 8 integrations with health score
v42_features_verified.softr_integration: Softr Database present in integration status with 'Missing' status (uses web scraping mode)
v42_features_verified.cicd_status: GET /api/cicd/status returns repository and code quality data (requires admin auth)
v42_features_verified.email_fallback: Registration works with demo Resend key (logs to console)
v42_features_verified.ai_agent_error_handling: Agent run endpoints return structured responses with type field
v42_features_verified.homepage_11_agents: Stats show 11 AI agents active with correct type badges
v42_features_verified.automation_panel_integrations: Shows real-time status from API with health score 25% (2/8 active)

mocked_apis_confirmed: Resend - logs to console when key is demo_placeholder
GitLab - returns mock project data without token
ProductHunt - skipped during scans without key
Manus AI - returns mock task IDs without key
Softr - web scraping mode without API key
